decision.overall_recommendation: Gate is open, so new entries are permissible, but this batch needs selective execution rather than blanket buying. BB and BTDR are the cleanest setups (highest SmartScores, strong RR, no bearish pattern conflict) and are the preferred entries. CORZ and CIFR carry high SmartScores/RR but both are flagged with a confirmed Double Top pattern (CIFR's pattern action explicitly says 'avoid long'), which directly contradicts the bullish technical setup — treat these as lower conviction or skip despite the numbers. AVTR is the weakest overall: negative ML edge, extended-above-value-area volume profile, and mixed timeframe alignment. Note that three of the five candidates (BTDR, CORZ, CIFR) are Bitcoin-mining-to-AI-infrastructure plays that move together on crypto/AI sentiment — even though existing Webull positions are sector-tagged 'Unknown' and no hard conflict is detectable, avoid stacking full size across all three simultaneously given the correlated risk. ML and pick track records are both below minimum sample size this run, so no reliability calibration is applied — MLEdgeFlag signals are taken at face value.
